title: oenothera multijuga var. parviflora
intro: Oenothera multijuga var. parviflora, also known as evening primrose, is a perennial plant in the Onagraceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and moisturizing effects. The health benefits of Oenothera multijuga var. parviflora include relief from menopausal symptoms, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Oenothera multijuga var. parviflora include capsules, oil, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues.
